text: Harriet Sansom Harris, who plays Dr. Rachel Blake, is best known as the iconic agent Bebe Glazer on 'Frasier'.

The analysts quickly pulling Alexei's flight data and medical history are known as Targeting Officers. They specialize in building a 'Target Package' to uncover a foreign national's vulnerabilities for potential recruitment.
The FSB, or Federal Security Service, is the principal security agency of Russia. Headquartered in Moscow, it serves as the primary successor to the infamous Soviet-era KGB.
When Martian says Vilnius is 'OBE', he's using intelligence slang for 'Overtaken By Events.' It means a planned operation or piece of intel is no longer relevant due to changing circumstances.
Gdańsk is Poland's principal seaport on the Baltic coast. The historic city played a pivotal role in the 1980s collapse of the Eastern Bloc as the birthplace of the Solidarity movement.
John Magaro plays CIA case officer Owen. He is no stranger to high-stakes missions, having played the tough-talking soldier Tibbet in the WWII action-horror thriller 'Overlord'.
